text: the defendant pleaded not guilty to all charges

text: the jury deliberated for three days before reaching a unanimous verdict

text: habeas corpus protects individuals from unlawful detention by the state

text: the contract is void if either party was under duress at the time of signing

text: the prosecution must prove guilt beyond a reasonable doubt

text: intellectual property rights include patents trademarks and trade secrets

text: the judge issued a restraining order to protect the victim from further harassment

text: the injunction ordered the company to cease its harmful business practices immediately

text: the right to privacy is increasingly challenged by digital surveillance technologies
translation: プライバシーの権利はデジタル監視技術によりますます脅かされている
